rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARIA BERTA CAMPOS LIVING TRUST DTD 09/10/2002 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner requests confirmation of Settlor's interest in the subject real property as a trust asset, pursuant to Probate Code §850 and case law. However, unlike cited case law, the settlor here was not the initial trustee, and no written acceptance was executed by the nominated trustee to serve. 2) It is unclear what Settlor's interest in the subject real property is, as it is unclear what Henry J. Solorzano's interest in the subject real property was. 3) Objection was filed on 4/6/18 by a Patricia Hewlett. Courtesy copy of the objection filed 4/25/18 has not been provided.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SANTOS LEE AND DIANA L. LEE GRANTOR TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Rescinding Irrevoacable Trust, Declaring Trust Void Ab Initio, For Order Cancelling Deed Void Ab Initio And Declaring Title To Asse
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: Petitioner requests termination of the subject trust based upon Probate Code §15403 and §15409. The surviving settlor has consented, but her consent states that "I understand that if the trust is terminated it will be distributed to Andre Lee." However, surviving settlor is a lifetime beneficiary of the trust and would be entitled to the same interest upon termination. Court to determine whether petition should be granted as requested and if a revised consent should be required.
